title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #1, Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Really? I'm glad it's just a dream!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: begone foul spirit, begone foul spirit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't go deciding by your- self!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Oh, such a wonder- full dining room!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is an incredible ship, YoHo- HoHo!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That's right. "Super" frankly made this ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't be so friendly with him, frankly.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: OR ON MY BACK!! YOHOHO HO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I love how unconcerned that sounds ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I don't know your name yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You two don't even know each other!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #1, Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.
